name: Mass Service Stop — Pre-Ransomware Indicator
description: Detects mass service stoppage: 3+ distinct services stopped on same host within 5 minutes, excluding normal Windows Update transitions.
query: event.code: "7036" AND winlog.event_data.param2: stopped AND NOT winlog.event_data.param1: ("Windows Update" OR "Background Intelligent Transfer Service" OR "Windows Defender Advanced Threat Protection Service")
